details: corrected 'th' to 'the' in node 4, and 'water bottle' to 'water bottles' in node 2
corrected 'an water' to 'and water' in node 4
changed and_join to select for research methods
added select for reading instructions option, added node 8 and edges
added ATM branch select, added nodes 8-11
corrected 'chose' to 'choose' in node 3
introduced loop for necktie selection dissatisfaction, added node 6
added select structure for delivery vs in-store pickup
corrected 'kindergarden' to 'kindergarten' in scenario
removed redundant edge 0->2 to fix linear flow

Introduced loop for time machine testing: added node 'time machine fails', modified edges (4->0 instead of 4->5, added 0->7, 7->5, 5->0), and restructured script_graph to include loop with entry '0', retry ['7','5','continue'], and exit '6'.
Removed trailing comma from node 6: changed 'try out for the roller hockey team,' to 'try out for the roller hockey team'.

Added loop structure for weekly dance classes; added nodes 6 (take a dance exam), 7 (pass the exam), 8 (attend additional classes); renamed node 1 from 'go to the class every week' to 'attend the first class'; edges updated accordingly.
Replaced and_join with select structure to reflect mutually exclusive use of computer or phone; edges unchanged.
corrected 'balooning' to 'ballooning' in scenario and node 0
Introduced loop for trying on shoes: added nodes 7,8,9; modified edges and script_graph to include a loop where the customer tries on shoes and can look for another pair if not satisfied.
corrected 'setup up a chess board' to 'set up a chess board' in node 2

removed node 'repeat until mastered', added nodes 'participate in a chess tournament to test level' and 'rated as master level', restructured script_graph from and_join to loop with nested select for practice options
introduced loop for searching music repeatedly by adding node '6' (add found songs to playlist) and restructuring edges and script_graph
removed due to implicit loop in edges (node 'Repeat the activity') and inability to restructure without duplication
